sections.heading: Overview
sections.content: All cortex data lives in `.cortex/cortex.db` â€” a SQLite database. This document defines the schema, the Python dataclasses that map to it, and the key query patterns.

sections.heading: Python Dataclasses
sections.content:
Defined in `cortex/models.py`. These are pure data â€” no DB or I/O logic.

### CortexNode
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `str` | `{project_id}::{dotpath}::{name}` |
| `node_type` | `str` | `atomic_process`, `composite_process`, `entity` (ADR-009: `document` and `constraint` retired) |
| `subtype` | `str \| None` | Required for process nodes. Values: `function`, `module`, `docjson`, `test`, `external_package`, `data_artifact` |
| `title` | `str` | Human-readable name |
| `location` | `str` | Repo-relative file path |
| `source` | `str` | `ast`, `doc_scanner`, `manual` |
| `code_hash` | `str` | SHA-256[:16] of code body (functions) or prose body (doc sections â€” ADR-009 hash swap) |
| `desc_hash` | `str \| None` | SHA-256[:16] of docstring (functions) or heading (doc sections â€” ADR-009 hash swap) |
| `file_mtime` | `float \| None` | Stored on module/doc nodes for mtime fast-path |
| `level_0` | `str` | One-word type label |
| `level_1` | `str` | One-line summary |
| `level_2` | `str \| None` | Full docstring / detailed description |
| `level_3_location` | `str \| None` | `path/file.py#L10-L45` â€” source location with line range |
| `level_steps` | `list[StepMarker] \| None` | dFlow step markers |
| `dflow_meta` | `dict \| None` | Parsed dFlow decorator metadata |
| `tags` | `list[str]` | Loaded from tags table |
| `status` | `str` | `active`, `deprecated`, `proposed` |

### CortexEdge
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | `str` | `{from_id}::{edge_type}::{to_id}` |
| `edge_type` | `str` | From ontology: `composes`, `validates`, `documents`, etc. |
| `from_id` | `str` | Source node ID |
| `to_id` | `str` | Target node ID |
| `weight` | `float` | Default 1.0 |
| `meta` | `dict \| None` | Optional edge metadata |

### StepMarker
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `step_num` | `float \| int` | Integer for major steps, float for minor (e.g. 1.1) |
| `name` | `str` | Step display name |
| `purpose` | `str` | What this step does |
| `inputs` | `str \| None` | Input description |
| `outputs` | `str \| None` | Output description |
| `critical` | `str \| None` | Warning about long-running or destructive operations |

sections.heading: ER Diagrams
sections.content:
Visual maps of table relationships. Column lists are kept minimal (PK + FKs + signature fields) â€” see the full DDL in the Schema section below.

### Core & Graph Tables

```mermaid
erDiagram
    nodes ||--o{ edges : "from_id"
    nodes ||--o{ edges : "to_id"
    nodes ||--o{ tags : "node_id"
    nodes ||--|| node_fts : "id"

    nodes {
        TEXT id PK
        TEXT node_type
        TEXT subtype
        TEXT title
        TEXT location
        TEXT code_hash
        TEXT desc_hash
        TEXT staleness
        TEXT status
    }

    edges {
        TEXT id PK
        TEXT edge_type
        TEXT from_id FK
        TEXT to_id FK
        REAL weight
    }

    tags {
        TEXT node_id FK
        TEXT tag
    }

    node_fts {
        TEXT id FK
        TEXT level_1
        TEXT level_2
    }
```

### History, Verification, Docs & Testing

```mermaid
erDiagram
    nodes ||--o{ node_history : "node_id"
    nodes ||--o| node_verification : "node_id"
    nodes ||--o{ node_renames : "old_id"
    nodes ||--o{ node_renames : "new_id"
    docs ||--o{ doc_sections : "doc_id"
    test_runs ||--o{ test_results : "run_id"
    nodes ||--o{ test_results : "node_id"

    nodes {
        TEXT id PK
    }

    node_history {
        INT id PK
        TEXT node_id FK
        TEXT change_type
        TEXT scanned_at
        TEXT meta
        INT preserved
    }

    node_verification {
        TEXT node_id PK
        TEXT status
        TEXT verified_at
        TEXT verified_by
        TEXT reason
        TEXT code_hash_at
        TEXT desc_hash_at
    }

    node_renames {
        TEXT old_id FK
        TEXT new_id FK
        TEXT renamed_at
    }

    docs {
        TEXT id PK
        TEXT title
        TEXT file_path
    }

    doc_sections {
        TEXT id PK
        TEXT doc_id FK
        TEXT heading
        INT level
        INT position
    }

    test_runs {
        INT id PK
        TEXT ran_at
        TEXT summary
    }

    test_results {
        INT id PK
        INT run_id FK
        TEXT node_id FK
        TEXT status
    }
```

sections.heading: SQLite Schema
sections.content:
### Core Tables

**nodes** â€” Primary entity table
```sql
CREATE TABLE nodes (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    node_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    subtype TEXT,
    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    location TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
    source TEXT NOT NULL,
    code_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
    desc_hash TEXT,
    file_mtime REAL,
    level_0 TEXT NOT NULL,
    level_1 TEXT NOT NULL,
    level_2 TEXT,
    level_3_location TEXT,
    level_steps TEXT,       -- JSON array of StepMarker
    dflow_meta TEXT,        -- JSON dict
    staleness TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CLEAN',  -- ADR-009: persisted staleness column
    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
);
```

**edges** â€” Typed relationships
```sql
CREATE TABLE edges (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    edge_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    from_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    to_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    weight REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0,
    meta TEXT               -- JSON dict
);
```

**tags** â€” Many-to-many
```sql
CREATE TABLE tags (node_id TEXT NOT NULL, tag TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (node_id, tag));
```

**node_fts** â€” Full-text search
```sql
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE node_fts USING fts5(id, level_1, level_2);
```

### History & Verification

**node_history** â€” Append-only change log
```sql
CREATE TABLE node_history (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    node_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    scanned_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    change_type TEXT NOT NULL,  -- Content: INITIAL, CONTENT_ONLY, DESC_ONLY, CONTENT_AND_DESC
                               -- Staleness: BECAME_CONTENT_STALE, BECAME_DESC_STALE,
                               --   BECAME_LINKED_STALE, BECAME_STRUCTURAL_DRIFT, BECAME_CLEAN
                               -- Structural: LINK_ADDED, LINK_REMOVED
                               -- Lifecycle: DELETED
                               -- Actor: AGENT_VERIFIED, MANUAL_VERIFIED, CHECKPOINT
    git_sha TEXT,
    meta TEXT,                  -- JSON: {reason: ...}
    preserved INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0  -- 1 = exempt from pruning
);
```

**node_verification** â€” Current verification state per node
```sql
CREATE TABLE node_verification (
    node_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES nodes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'VERIFIED',
    verified_at TEXT NOT NULL,
    verified_by TEXT NOT NULL,  -- 'human' or 'agent' or 'agent:model-name'
    reason TEXT,
    code_hash_at TEXT NOT NULL,  -- Expires when code_hash changes
    desc_hash_at TEXT            -- ADR-009: expires when desc_hash changes
);
```

### Documentation

**docs** â€” DocJSON file records
```sql
CREATE TABLE docs (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, tags TEXT, file_path TEXT NOT NULL, desc_hash TEXT, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL);
```

**doc_sections** â€” Sections within docs
```sql
CREATE TABLE doc_sections (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    doc_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES docs(id),
    heading TEXT NOT NULL,
    level INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 2,
    tags TEXT,
    content TEXT,
    desc_hash TEXT,
    position INTEGER NOT NULL,
    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL
);
```

`position` orders sections within a document (0, 1, 2, ...).

### Testing

**test_runs** â€” Pytest execution metadata
```sql
CREATE TABLE test_runs (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, ran_at TEXT NOT NULL, git_sha TEXT, runner_cmd TEXT, scope TEXT, duration_s REAL, summary TEXT);
```

**test_results** â€” Per-test outcomes linked to runs
```sql
CREATE TABLE test_results (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, run_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES test_runs(id), node_id TEXT, pytest_id TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, duration_s REAL, message TEXT, code_hash_at_run TEXT);
```

### Tracking

**node_renames** â€” Rename history
```sql
CREATE TABLE node_renames (old_id TEXT NOT NULL, new_id TEXT NOT NULL, renamed_at TEXT NOT NULL, file_path TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (old_id, new_id));
```

sections.heading: Key Query Patterns
sections.content:
- **Full-text search:** `db.fts_search(path, query)` â€” three-stage: FTS5 ranked -> LIKE-AND -> LIKE-OR
- **Edge traversal:** `db.query_edges(path, node_id, direction, depth)` â€” recursive for depth > 1
- **Children of a module:** `db.query_children(path, parent_id)` â€” one-hop composes edges
- **Staleness check:** Compare `code_hash`/`desc_hash` against live re-parsed values; promote via `node_verification`
- **Latest test results:** `db.get_latest_test_results(path, node_ids)` â€” most recent status per test node
- **Stale doc sections:** `db.get_stale_doc_sections(path)` â€” sections whose linked code nodes changed after the section's last update

**Section queries:**
- All sections of a doc: `WHERE doc_id = ? ORDER BY position`
